title: aragallus lambertii
intro: Aragallus lambertii, also known as Lambert's aragallus or western aragallus, is a perennial herb native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. Aragallus lambertii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
